SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUCKER, BERNARD WM. SERVED MAR-03-2008, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL
STIPULATION FOR IMMEDIATE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUCKER, BERNARD WM. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 FELL STREET, SF, 94102. $306,227.34 RENT, $10,535.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $563.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $317,325.34, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT OF EXECUTION CAN BE ISSUED FORTHWITH; UPON REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF WRIT OF POSSESSION CAN ISSUE AFTER JUNE-15-08. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
